response: This code implements the **standard triple-nested loop matrix multiplication algorithm**, computing the product of two matrices `A` (size `m×n`) and `B` (size `n×p`) by iterating over each element and calculating the dot product of rows from `A` and columns from `B` using the formula `result[i][j] = Σ (A[i][k] × B[k][j])` for `k` from `0` to `n-1`.
